EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface INetworkAttribute

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of an attribute in a network dataset.

[Guid("AE92A9B6-9C80-41B1-B84D-765F18B43625")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface INetworkAttribute

Properties

DataType

Type of data used in this network attribute.

esriNetworkAttributeDataType DataType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNetworkAttributeDataType

Examples

Sample Snippet

ID

Unique identifier of this network attribute.

int ID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsTimeAware[esriNetworkElementType]

Indicates if the network attribute is time aware.

bool IsTimeAware[esriNetworkElementType ElementType] { get; }

Parameters

ElementType esriNetworkElementType

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

Name of this network attribute.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

Array of parameters for this network attribute.

IArray Parameters { get; set; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

Units

Units of this network attribute.

esriNetworkAttributeUnits Units { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNetworkAttributeUnits

Examples

Sample Snippet

UsageType

Usage type of this network attribute.

esriNetworkAttributeUsageType UsageType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNetworkAttributeUsageType

Examples

Sample Snippet

UseByDefault

Indicates if this network attribute is to be used by default.

bool UseByDefault { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

Refresh()

Refresh the network evaluators assigned to this network attribute.
